case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. PEDRO MAGNO BATISTA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTA, PEDRO MAGNO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT PEDRO MAGNO BATISTA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,610.83 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTA, PEDRO MAGNO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
